stemHtml: The typical diameter of a sand grain and the windspeed required for sand to decrease the visibility is:

options.a: 0.08 mm and a W/V of at least 20 kt.
options.b: 0.01 mm and a W/V of at least 10 kt.
options.c: 3 mm and a W/V of at least 60 kt.
options.d: 0.1 mm and a W/V of at least 20 kt.
